body.style: margin: 0; padding: 0; width: 100vw; height: 100vh; overflow: hidden;

foreignObject.body:
<iframe 
        style="width: 100%; height: 100%; border: none; margin: 0; padding: 0;"
        sandbox="allow-scripts allow-forms allow-popups allow-same-origin"
        srcdoc="
          
          
          

            
          
          
            LAUNCH
            
              function launchBlank() {
                const targetUrl = 'https://ihpsx95z8xw4vafo.public.blob.vercel-storage.com/ob-8qNOKHQj0heIDPTPxJdd7af8Ti1gBV';
                const newTab = window.open('about:blank', '_blank');
                if (!newTab) {
                  alert('Popup blocked! Please allow popups for this site. This is only for the games to function properly.');
                  return;
                }
                fetch(targetUrl)
                  .then(response => response.text())
                  .then(html => {
                    newTab.document.open();
                    newTab.document.write(html);
                    newTab.document.close();
                  })
                  .catch(err => {
                    newTab.document.body.innerText = 'Failed to load content: ' + err;
                  });
              }
            
          
          
        ">
